items.requirement: Must include risk management system documentation (EU AI Act Article 9)
Must include a conformity assessment reference (EU AI Act Article 43)
Must classify the AI system risk level (EU AI Act Article 6)
Must document human oversight measures (EU AI Act Article 14)
Must specify the level of human involvement in decisions (NIST Govern 1.4)
Must document system accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity measures (EU AI Act Article 15)
Must document data governance practices (EU AI Act Article 10)
Must document data provenance and collection methodology (EU AI Act Article 10(2))
Must document data representativeness and potential biases (EU AI Act Article 10(2)(f))
Must document data quality assurance measures (NIST Measure 2.5)
Must include demographic subgroup analysis for protected characteristics (EU AI Act Article 10(2)(f))
Must include quantitative fairness metrics (NIST Measure 2.6)
Must document bias mitigation strategies applied (NIST Measure 2.7)
Must report disaggregated performance across subgroups (NIST Measure 2.3)
Must include performance metrics for all claimed system capabilities (EU AI Act Article 11)
Must include transparency disclosures for end users (EU AI Act Article 13)
Must document how affected individuals are informed about AI usage (NIST Govern 1.2)
Must document contestability and appeal mechanisms (NIST Govern 1.5)
Must document foreseeable misuse risks (EU AI Act Article 9(2)(b))
Must document residual risks after mitigation (EU AI Act Article 9(4))
Must document societal impact assessment (NIST Map 5.1)
Must document post-deployment monitoring plan (EU AI Act Article 61)
Must include incident reporting procedures (EU AI Act Article 62)
Must document record-keeping and logging capabilities (EU AI Act Article 12)
Must document model versioning and update procedures (NIST Manage 1.3)
Must include third-party audit or testing documentation (NIST Manage 4.1)
